articles.title: GLM 5.2测评：跻身第一梯队
articles.excerpt: 老规矩私有bench 案例都很不错 第三个在这个案例中做热力学图的模型，前两个是Mythos和3.5Flash 正如知乎nao榜所言，日后通过中转贩子使用opus的人，都需要面对一个问题，你用的opus如果是glm5.2冒充的，而且难以分辨。 在实际bot agent体验上，如果不是对opus4.6特别熟悉的人基本无法分辨出两者。并且其追随上文的能力很强。如果上文用的opus，继续用glm5.2根本无法分别。 其缺点目前来看，上下文注意力可能不如4.6强（说实在的比4.6强的也几乎没有）。这次上1M上下文盲猜的DS V4的技术落地，DSA的注意力只能说目前来看中规中矩而已。 不过真的恭喜智谱啊

EvoArena: Tracking Memory Evolution for Robust LLM Agents in Dynamic Environments
articles.excerpt: Large language model (LLM) agents have achieved strong performance on a wide range of benchmarks, yet most evaluations assume static environments. In contrast, real-world deployment is inherently dynamic, requiring agents to continually align their knowledge, skills, and behavior with changing envir
articles.summary: EvoArena 通过跟踪代理记忆的演化过程，使LLM代理能在动态环境中持续对齐知识与行为。相比静态评估，该方法显著提升代理在环境变化下的鲁棒性和适应性，填补了现实部署与静态基准间的鸿沟。

articles.title: MiniMax Sparse Attention
articles.excerpt: Ultra-long-context capability is becoming indispensable for frontier LLMs: agentic workflows, repository-scale code reasoning, and persistent memory all require the model to jointly attend over hundreds of thousands to millions of tokens, yet the quadratic cost of softmax attention makes this untena
articles.summary: MiniMax Sparse Attention 提出一种稀疏注意力机制，将计算复杂度从二次降至线性，使LLM高效处理百万级token的超长上下文。该方法在保持模型性能的同时显著降低显存与时间开销，适用于代理工作流和代码推理等场景。

articles.title: WeaveBench: A Long-Horizon, Real-World Benchmark for Computer-Use Agents with Hybrid Interfaces
articles.excerpt: Computer-use agents (CUAs) increasingly operate in runtimes that combine visual desktop control, command-line execution, code editing, browsers, and external tools. Existing benchmarks, however, often evaluate these interfaces as separable capabilities, leaving long-horizon cross-interface orchestra
articles.summary: WeaveBench 是一个针对计算机使用代理（CUA）的长期真实世界基准，评估其在混合接口（视觉桌面、命令行、代码编辑、浏览器等）间进行跨接口协调的能力。相比现有分离式评估，该基准能更全面地反映代理在复杂多步任务中的实际表现。

articles.title: SpatialClaw: Rethinking Action Interface for Agentic Spatial Reasoning
articles.excerpt: Spatial reasoning, the ability to determine where objects are, how they relate, and how they move in 3D, remains a fundamental challenge for vision-language models (VLMs). Tool-augmented agents attempt to address this by augmenting VLMs with specialist perception modules, yet their effectiveness is
articles.summary: SpatialClaw 重新设计了用于空间推理的代理动作接口，使VLM能更有效地调用专家感知模块。该方法通过在动作层面优化交互，显著提升了3D物体定位、关系理解和运动预测的准确率。

articles.title: InterleaveThinker: Reinforcing Agentic Interleaved Generation
articles.excerpt: Recent image generators have demonstrated impressive photorealism and instruction-following capabilities in single-image generation and editing. However, constrained by their architectures, they cannot achieve interleaved generation (text-image sequence), which has crucial applications in visual nar
articles.summary: InterleaveThinker 引入强化学习框架，使图像生成模型能够生成交错的文本-图像序列，突破单图像生成的限制。该方法在视觉叙事等任务中展现了连贯的多步生成能力，显著优于现有流水线方案。

articles.title: Robust-U1: Can MLLMs Self-Recover Corrupted Visual Content for Robust Understanding?
articles.excerpt: Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have demonstrated remarkable success in visual understanding, yet their performance degrades significantly under real-world visual corruptions. While existing robustness enhancement approaches exist, they are limited: black-box feature alignment lacks interpr
articles.summary: Robust-U1 探索多模态大模型（MLLM）对损坏视觉内容的自恢复能力。通过引入自恢复机制，模型能在不依赖外部模块的情况下修复图像损坏并维持理解性能，相比黑盒特征对齐方法更具可解释性和实用性。

articles.title: FORT-Searcher: Synthesizing Shortcut-Resistant Search Tasks for Training Deep Search Agents
articles.excerpt: Training deep search agents requires verifiable questions whose answers remain unavailable until sufficient evidence has been acquired through search. Existing synthesis methods often increase apparent difficulty by enriching graph structures, but structural complexity alone does not guarantee reali
articles.summary: FORT-Searcher 通过合成抗捷径的搜索任务来训练深度搜索代理，确保问题答案必须通过多步搜索证据才能获得。该方法避免了结构复杂但易被捷径破解的缺陷，显著提升了代理的真实搜索能力。

articles.title: LabVLA: Grounding Vision-Language-Action Models in Scientific Laboratories
articles.excerpt: Scientific laboratories increasingly rely on AI systems to reason about experiments, but the physical act of doing science remains largely outside their reach. AI can help read literature, generate hypotheses, and plan protocols, yet the execution of those protocols at the bench still requires a hum
articles.summary: LabVLA 将视觉-语言-动作（VLA）模型应用于科学实验室，使AI不仅能推理实验方案，还能通过视觉和动作指令直接执行物理操作（如移液、测量）。该方法弥合了AI科学推理与实验执行之间的鸿沟。

articles.title: VIA-SD: Verification via Intra-Model Routing for Speculative Decoding
articles.excerpt: Speculative decoding (SD) addresses the high inference costs of LLMs by having lightweight drafters generate candidates for large verifiers to validate in parallel. Existing draft-verify methods use binary decisions: accept or fully recompute. Yet we find that many rejected tokens can be verified co
articles.summary: VIA-SD 在推测解码中引入模型内路由机制，对被拒绝的候选token进行部分验证而非完全重计算。该方法在不牺牲质量的前提下进一步降低了LLM推理延迟，加速比现有二值验证方案更高。

articles.title: From 2D Grids to 1D Tokens: Reforming Shared Representations for Multimodal Image Fusion
articles.excerpt: Multimodal image fusion aims to integrate complementary information from different modalities into a fused image that preserves rich local details while maintaining globally consistent appearance. Existing approaches build shared representations on 2D feature grids, which excel at modeling local str
articles.summary: 该方法将多模态图像融合的共享表示从传统的2D特征网格重构为1D token序列，同时保留局部细节与全局一致性。相比2D网格方法，基于token的表示在融合不同模态信息时表现出更强的灵活性和性能。

articles.title: HYDRA-X: Native Unified Multimodal Models with Holistic Visual Tokenizers
articles.excerpt: Holistic visual tokenizers are fundamental to unified multimodal models (UMMs) as they map diverse visual inputs into a unified representation space. In this paper, we present HYDRA-X, the first UMM that unifies image and video tokenization within a single Vision Transformer (ViT). Our design is dri
articles.summary: HYDRA-X 是首个在单个Vision Transformer（ViT）内统一图像和视频tokenization的原生统一多模态模型（UMM）。该设计消除了对专用视频编码器的依赖，通过统一的视觉表示空间实现了图像与视频任务的无缝迁移。

articles.title: N-GRPO: Embedding-Level Neighbor Mixing for Enhanced Policy Optimization
articles.excerpt: The success of Large Language Models in mathematical reasoning relies heavily on the generation of diverse and valid solution paths during the rollout phase. However, current rollout techniques face a fundamental trade-off: token-level sampling often yields redundant trajectories that differ only in
articles.summary: N-GRPO 在策略优化中引入嵌入级别的邻居混合，通过生成更丰富多样的有效轨迹来提升LLM数学推理的rollout多样性。该方法缓解了token级别采样导致轨迹冗余的问题，在数学推理基准上取得了显著提升。

articles.title: EurekAgent: Agent Environment Engineering is All You Need For Autonomous Scientific Discovery
articles.excerpt: LLM-based agents have shown increasing potential in automating scientific discovery. Given an optimizable metric and an execution environment, they can propose, validate, and iterate scientific solutions, and have produced results that outperform human-designed approaches. As model capabilities cont
articles.summary: EurekAgent 认为智能体环境工程是自主科学发现的关键。通过构建可优化的执行环境与度量指标，LLM代理能自主提出、验证并迭代科学方案，在多个领域产生超越人类设计的成果。

articles.title: Demystifying Hidden-State Recurrence: Switchable Latent Reasoning with On-Policy Reinforcement Learning
articles.excerpt: Latent chain-of-thought compresses reasoning by replacing visible reasoning traces with continuous hidden-state recurrence, but existing formulations are difficult to optimize with standard on-policy reinforcement learning (RL) and hard to interpret causally. Our key insight is that a single pair of
articles.summary: 该工作揭示潜在思维链中隐藏状态循环的可优化性，提出可切换的潜在推理方法并结合on-policy强化学习进行训练。相比现有方法，该方案在保持压缩推理优势的同时，显著提升了策略优化效率和因果可解释性。

articles.title: DyCo-RL: Dynamic Cross-Modal Coordination for Visual Reasoning
articles.excerpt: Reinforcement Learning with Verifiable Rewards (RLVR) has emerged as a leading paradigm for enhancing visual reasoning in Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs). However, existing RLVR methods optimize primarily for the reasoning outcome, fundamentally overlooking the fine-grained cross-modal coor
articles.summary: DyCo-RL 在基于可验证奖励的强化学习（RLVR）中引入动态跨模态协调机制，不再仅优化推理结果，而是细粒度地协调视觉与语言表征的交互。该方法在视觉推理任务上显著优于仅优化结果的RLVR基线。

articles.title: MoVerse: Real-Time Video World Modeling with Panoramic Gaussian Scaffold
articles.excerpt: We present MoVerse, a real-time video world model that creates an interactively navigable scene from a single narrow-field-of-view image. This setting is challenging because the input observes only a small fraction of the environment, while interactive roaming requires a complete surrounding world,
articles.summary: MoVerse 利用全景高斯支架，从单个窄视野图像实时构建可交互导航的视频世界模型。该方法能够在输入仅覆盖环境极小部分的情况下，高效生成完整的周围世界，并支持实时漫游。

articles.title: TreeSeeker: Tree-Structured Trial, Error, and Return in Deep Search
articles.excerpt: Deep search requires agents to answer complex questions through multi-step web search, browsing, evidence comparison, and synthesis. articles.summary: TreeSeeker 采用树状结构进行试错与回溯，让深度搜索代理在多个候选方向中动态探索，避免贪心搜索陷阱。该方法通过结构化回溯有效管理证据收集过程，显著提升了多步搜索问答的准确率和鲁棒性。

articles.title: HarnessBridge: Learnable Bidirectional Controller for LLM Agent Harness
articles.excerpt: Large language models are increasingly deployed as agents for long-horizon tasks, yet their performance is shaped not only by model capability and environment design, but also by the harness that mediates agent--environment interaction. Existing harnesses are largely manually engineered, making them
articles.summary: HarnessBridge 提出一种可学习的双向控制器，用于动态优化LLM代理与环境的交互框架（harness）。相比手工设计的固定harness，该方法能根据任务自动调整交互策略，显著提升代理在长程任务中的表现。

articles.title: Risk Under Pressure: Compute-Aware Evaluation of Adversarial Robustness in Language Models
articles.excerpt: Adversarial robustness evaluations of large language models (LLMs) typically report attack success rate (ASR) under fixed query budgets, implicitly treating all attacks as equally costly. In practice, the computational expense of different attack strategies can vary by orders of magnitude. Consequen
articles.summary: 该工作提出计算感知的对抗鲁棒性评估框架，将不同攻击策略的计算成本纳入考量，而非简单使用固定查询预算下的ASR。该方法能更真实地反映LLM在资源约束下的鲁棒性，避免对昂贵攻击的低估。

articles.title: Visual Para-Thinker++: A Single-Policy Multi-Agent Framework for Visual Reasoning

articles.summary: Visual Para-Thinker++ 采用单策略多智能体框架，使共享的MLLM策略实例化多个并行推理线索，从不同区域、属性和关系综合证据。该方法有效缓解了单链推理中的早期承诺和幻觉问题，提升了视觉推理的准确性和鲁棒性。

articles.title: SG-OPD: Sign-Gated On-Policy Distillation via Sign-Consistency Gating and Phased Teacher Sampling

articles.title: EvoBrowseComp: Benchmarking Search Agents on Evolving Knowledge

articles.title: MaskAlign: Token-Subset Representation Alignment for Efficient Diffusion Training
articles.excerpt: Representation alignment with pretrained vision models has recently shown strong potential for accelerating diffusion transformer training. By aligning intermediate diffusion features with clean-image representations from self-supervised vision encoders, existing methods improve convergence and gene
